chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3767 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 16508/17 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 16497/17 4. For Katcha Peshi. 21.12.2017. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang, Advocate for petitioner. On the last date of hearing learned Counsel was put on notice to satisfy about the maintainability of this petition. Today, by urgent motion this petition has been brought before us. Learned Counsel has argued that the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner. We have gone through the contents of the petition. Essentially the petitioner under the garb of some alleged harassment is seeking mutation in foti khata badal of properties allegedly left by Akhtiar Ahmed, the father of petitioner, and the official partition of the same properties, which relief being beyond the scope of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 cannot be granted to the Petitioner. The petition is not maintainable and is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
